> Use this template to open a tracking issue for an RFC. The full
> proposal lives as a Markdown file under [`docs/rfc/`](../../docs/rfc/),
> not in this issue body — copy
> [`docs/rfc/_template.md`](../../docs/rfc/_template.md) to
> `docs/rfc/NNN-short-name.md`, send it as a draft PR, and link the PR
> here.

## Summary

One paragraph: what is this RFC about?

## Why now

What problem are we solving? What is the cost of doing nothing?
